English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State Patrons of Husbandry records
New York State Grange
3381
456 cubic feet. 456 cubic feet.
[ca. 1874]-2020. Financial Records, Research Materials Records of defunct local Granges consist primarily of minute and roll books and treasurers' accounts, but also include drill manuals, program books, bylaws, degree records, quarterly reports to the State Grange, certificates, and records of a few Junior Granges. The records of about half of these Granges extend, usually continuously, over a period of fifty years or more; about ten percent extend, usually continuously, from the 1870s or 1880s to the 1960s or 1970s. 415 417 418 419 420 421 422 423 424 425 426 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2083921
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC staff
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle, July 2007
Last modified:
RMC Staff, January 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of defunct local Granges consist primarily of minute and roll books and treasurers' accounts, but also include drill manuals, program books, bylaws, degree records, quarterly reports to the State Grange, certificates, and records of a few Junior Granges. The records of about half of these Granges extend, usually continuously, over a period of fifty years or more; about ten percent extend, usually continuously, from the 1870s or 1880s to the 1960s or 1970s.
Cite As:
New York State Patrons of Husbandry records, #3381. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Restrictions on Use:
Permission to publish requires consent of the Master of the New York State Grange.
Rolls. Bylaws (administrative records) Account books. Farmers -- Societies, etc. Agriculture -- New York (State)
2083921 Contents
Scope and Contents
A copy of the printed guide is available by clicking here. (3 MB Searchable PDF)
